Showcase.description: Pick a scene, fill in details, and let AI handle the rest

Features.description: Designed for beginners — no design experience, no learning curve, ready in 30 seconds
Features.step1Desc: Pick from 20+ scene templates closest to your needs. Each template is optimized by professional designers.
Features.step2Desc: Just enter a product name, style preference, and other simple info — no need to learn complex prompt techniques.
Features.step3Desc: AI automatically converts your info into professional prompts and generates your creation. Multiple sizes and formats supported.

HowItWorks.description: Creators across industries use VideoFly to ship ideas faster
HowItWorks.case1Desc: Use the 'Product Photo' template to generate product hero images in 30 seconds
HowItWorks.case2Desc: Use the 'Social Post' template to create stunning share images with one click
HowItWorks.case3Desc: Use the 'Blog Cover' template to batch-generate covers, 10x content efficiency

CTA.description: No credit card required. Start your AI creation journey today.
CTA.highlight2Desc: Seconds for images, minutes for videos
CTA.highlight3Desc: No design skills or prompts needed

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: The top 6 questions from first-time users
FAQ.contact: Still have questions? Feel free to contact us
FAQ.q1: I know nothing about AI. Can I use this?
FAQ.a1: Absolutely. VideoFly is built for people who want results without learning a complicated workflow. Write a prompt or upload a reference image and the studio handles the rest.
FAQ.q2: How many credits does it take to generate an image or video?
FAQ.a2: Image generation costs 1–2 credits, video generation costs 2–5 credits, depending on the model and parameters. You receive free trial credits upon signup, enough for multiple tries. Credit packs are purchased as needed — no subscription pressure.
FAQ.q3: Can I use the generated images/videos commercially?
FAQ.a3: Yes. Content generated with VideoFly can be used for advertising, social media, e-commerce, and other commercial work. If you upload a reference image, make sure you have the rights to use that source asset.
FAQ.a4: Images typically complete in 15–30 seconds; videos usually take 1–3 minutes. You can start other tasks while waiting — the system will notify you when done.
FAQ.q5: Can I regenerate if I'm not satisfied with the result?
FAQ.a5: Yes. Each regeneration consumes one credit. For better results, try adding more specific descriptions or adjusting style parameters in the template.
FAQ.a6: Images support JPG, PNG, and WebP formats, up to 2K resolution. Videos support MP4 format, up to 1080P resolution. All files can be downloaded directly to your device.

Footer.tagline: An AI video studio for teams shipping fast. Start from a prompt, upload a still, choose a model, and get much closer to a final cut in one flow.
Footer.madeWith: Made with {heart} by the VideoFly team

ToolPage.tipsLine1: Be specific about subject, lighting, and motion.
ToolPage.tipsLine3: Add mood words: cinematic, dreamy, minimal.
ToolPage.generatingHint: Generation in progress — you can start another task meanwhile.
ToolPage.guestPreviewDescription: Login to generate and view your high-quality AI videos.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Text: By accessing and using PixelMuse, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.
Terms.section2Text: Subject to these terms, PixelMuse grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the platform to generate image and video content. Generated content may be used for personal and commercial purposes.
Terms.section3Text: The materials on PixelMuse's website are provided "as is". PixelMuse makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties.
Terms.section4Text: In no event shall PixelMuse or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on PixelMuse's website.
Terms.section5Text: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at support@pixelmuse.app.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Text: Welcome to PixelMuse. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
Privacy.section2Text: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, generate images or videos, or contact support.
Privacy.section3Text: We use your data to provide and improve our services, including AI image and video generation and maintaining your transaction history.
Privacy.section4Text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information.
Privacy.section5Text: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us at support@pixelmuse.app.
